/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/drag_opt_fd.dir/opt_ipopt.cpp.o CMakeFiles/drag_opt_fd.dir/drag_tnlp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/drag_opt_fd.dir/svg_shape.cpp.o CMakeFiles/drag_opt_fd.dir/drag_objective.cpp.o CMakeFiles/drag_opt_fd.dir/bezier_geom.cpp.o -o drag_opt_fd  ../src/libsparta_serial.a ../src/STUBS/libmpi_stubs.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libipopt.dylib
